economic_notes: Nation operates grocery store, gas bar, confectionery, restaurant (MCN Foods), high speed internet (Misipawistik Telecommunications Cooperative), 1/2 interest in Pinesiw Energy Limited Partnership, 1/7 interest in Aseneskak Casino, VLT lounge (Chus-Chug-U Gaming Trust), Grand Rapids First Nation Development Trust (Manitoba Hydro settlement funds). Hydro claim in arbitration for damages related to development on traditional territory. COVID-19 reduced VLT revenues.
notes: Going concern noted due to high debt load ($34.17M in demand loans from Bank of Montreal) and COVID-19 revenue reductions. Net debt position of $33.48M. 4 consolidated subsidiaries (Housing Authority, Gaming Commission, Immediate Use Fund, Health Authority Inc.) and 6 GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Community Development and Community Services segments shown separately in statements but mapped to available categories. ESDC revenue of $400,634 included in segment disclosure but not broken out as separate line in statement of operations. Cash balance of $2,819,197 includes $276,113 externally restricted housing replacement reserve. No schedule of remuneration provided. No budget presented for the year.
